title: Account Reconciliation Screen
objective: Build the ReconciliationScreen where the user enters the actual account balance, sees the discrepancy, and creates a correction transaction (RECONCILIATION_ADJUSTMENT for Bank/Cash/CreditCard, REVALUATION for Investment).
execution_steps: Create ReconciliationViewModel: accept account, fetch recorded balance via GetAccountBalancesUseCase, compute discrepancy = actual - recorded
Build ReconciliationScreen: show account name, recorded balance, actual balance input, computed discrepancy (color-coded: green=0, red=negative, amber=positive)
Zero discrepancy: show 'Reconciled ✓' + timestamp confirmation, no transaction created
Non-zero + non-investment account: show 'Create Correction' button, call ReconcileAccountUseCase to create RECONCILIATION_ADJUSTMENT row (amount locked = abs(discrepancy), optional note)
Non-zero + investment account: show 'Create Revaluation' button, call ReconcileAccountUseCase to create REVALUATION row with gain/loss label
Add reconcile shortcut button to Dashboard account cards
Write ViewModel unit tests: discrepancy computation, correct transaction type by account type
Manual check via SCN-010, SCN-011, SCN-012
definition_of_done: Zero discrepancy shows confirmation, no transaction created
RECONCILIATION_ADJUSTMENT amount is locked to discrepancy (user cannot edit)
REVALUATION only offered for Investment account type
After correction save, account balance equals entered actual value
